verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Shackled by a heavy burden, 'Neath a load of guilt and shame; Then the hand of Jesus touched me, And now I am no longer the same.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He touched me, Oh, He touched me, And oh, the joy that floods my soul. Something happened, and now I know, He touched me and made me whole.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Since I met this blessed Savior, Since He cleansed and made me whole; I will never cease to praise Him, I'll shout it while eternity rolls.
